new_classes.definition_en: Natural or artificial mineral waters and aerated waters, not containing added sugar, other sweetening matter or flavouring; ice and snow. Covers goods referred to in HS Explanatory Notes to heading 2201, paragraphs B and C. Excludes natural mineral water put up for skin care in aerosol containers (heading 3304).

Quality borne by a water beverage that is either a natural or artificial mineral water (having a specific mineral composition recognised under applicable regulations) or an aerated (carbonated) water, without any added sugar, sweetening matter or flavouring.

new_classes.label_en: No added sugar, sweetening matter or flavouring quality
new_classes.definition_en: Quality borne by a water beverage that contains no added sugar, other sweetening matter or flavouring substances, used to discriminate CN heading 2201 from heading 2202.

coverage_explanation: The core distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) the beverage is a mineral water or aerated water (MineralOrAeratedWaterQuality), and (2) it contains no added sugar, sweetening matter or flavouring (NoAddedSugarOrFlavouringQuality / complement of FlavoredOrSweetenedWaterQuality — reusing the existing TBox quality). The explicit exclusion of natural mineral water in aerosol skin-care containers (heading 3304) cannot be fully expressed in OWL class axioms without a dedicated 'PresentationForm' or 'IntendedUse' quality (not currently in the TBox), so this exclusion is documented here but not axiomatised, reducing coverage slightly. CN subheading 22011011 is the first eight-digit code within the 2201 10 subheading group (mineral/aerated waters); the parent heading class MineralWaterAeratedWater2201 is introduced here to carry the shared criteria for the entire 2201 10 x block. The distinction between the specific eight-digit codes within 2201 (e.g. 22011011 vs 22011019 vs 22011090) depends on further sub-criteria (e.g. natural vs artificial mineral water, specific carbonation levels) not fully spelled out in the provided legal note, leaving some residual gap.
